name: No Bake Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese and confectioners' sugar. Mix well.
2. Add the crunchy peanut butter to the mixture and continue to mix until combined.
3. Slowly add the milk while continuing to mix.
4. Gently fold in the thawed whipped topping.
5. Pour the mixture into a pie shell with the chocolate flavored crust.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
7. Once chilled, drizzle each serving with chocolate syrup.
